name: terminal-feedback
description: Single-plugin marketplace for ghostty-terminal-feedback — visual terminal feedback for Claude Code sessions

plugins.name: ghostty-terminal-feedback
plugins.description: Visual terminal feedback for Claude Code sessions. In Ghostty/iTerm2/Kitty/etc. it changes the terminal background via OSC 11 and sends macOS notifications. Inside cmux it colors the workspace tab and routes notifications through the cmux panel. Switches automatically based on CMUX_PANEL_ID.
